relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线（AP Chinese assessment, metalinguistic asymmetry, epistemic authority）的关联度很低。它处理的是中国高中生英语学习中grit与情绪变量对成绩的中介效应，属于个体差异心理学范式下的量化研究，既不涉及评估制度文件的批判性分析，也不触及元语言不对称或知识权威的建构问题，与你的制度性论证和文件证据写作方向几乎没有交集。

title: Language assessment literacy: an uncharted area for the English language teachers in Bangladesh
author: Nasreen Sultana
abstract: Language assessment literacy (LAL) is a critical field for researchers, scholars, or anyone interested in improving the language teaching environment. Understanding the basics of testing and the ability to perform testing-related activities becomes more significant in test-oriented countries. As such, in the extremely exam-oriented milieu of Bangladesh, giving tests and preparing students for high…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"AP Chinese assessment, metalinguistic asymmetry, and epistemic authority"在制度性评估素养（assessment literacy）如何制约教师实践这一层面有间接关联：它聚焦考试导向体制下教师评估素养的缺失，与你在LAQ稿件中论证AP Chinese考试框架如何通过制度设计预设知识权威、压缩教师与学生的能动空间形成对话——两者都在追问"评估制度把什么能力定义为合法，又把谁排除在外"。

title: Renal Association Clinical Practice Guideline on Haemodialysis
author: Damien Ashby, Natalie Borman, James O. Burton et al.
abstract: This guideline is written primarily for doctors and nurses working in dialysis units and related areas of medicine in the UK, and is an update of a previous version written in 2009. It aims to provide guidance on how to look after patients and how to run dialysis units, and provides standards which units should in general aim to achieve. We would not advise patients to interpret the guideline as a…
relevance: 这篇论文是肾脏病学领域的临床血液透析实践指南，与用户当前研究画像（应用语言学、教育语言政策、批判话语分析）及今日主线（AP Chinese assessment、元语言不对称、知识权威）没有实质性的学科关联。

title: “I think I am bilingual, but…”: Teachers’ practices of and student’ attitudes toward translanguaging in a Chinese intercultural communication class
author: Wang Zhi-jie, Bin Shen
abstract: Abstract Translanguaging encourages active and integrated usage of varied languages and other resources and exploitation of students’ whole linguistic repertories and cultural resources in teaching and learning. Zooming into an intercultural communication class in an English‐as‐a‐medium‐of‐instruction (EMI) fashion, the present study intends to discuss the teacher's pedagogical translanguaging pra…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"Translanguaging, identity negotiation, and action research in EMI classrooms"高度贴合：它同样聚焦中国高校EMI课堂中的教师教学性translanguaging实践，并将学生态度纳入分析，与你稿件中探讨学生身份协商和translanguaging感知的维度直接对话，可作为你定位研究贡献时的"已有研究"参照点——你需要说清楚自己的稿件在哪里超越了这类"实践描述＋态度调查"的框架。

title: Enactment of English medium instruction in under-resourced educational contexts: A case of multilingual public secondary schools in Nepal
author: Tae-Hee Choi, Prem Prasad Poudel
abstract: English as a medium of instruction (EMI) policy has shown substantial growth in all levels of education, driven by diverse aspirations such as raising individuals’ global competitiveness and internationalization of education. Such a growth of EMI has been questioned from equity perspective. However, they largely draw on perception-based evidence, and do not capture exactly why and how the EMI has …
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"Translanguaging, identity negotiation, and action research in EMI classrooms"在EMI政策与课堂实践的张力这一层面直接相关，尤其是它从"enacted policy"视角考察官方多语政策与实际EMI实践之间的落差，能为你的稿件提供一个对照性的制度背景论证——你的研究聚焦教师如何通过translanguaging在EMI课堂中协商身份，而这篇文章则揭示EMI在资源匮乏环境中被执行时的结构性矛盾，两者共同指向EMI并非单一的语言选择而是权力与资源分配的场域。

title: The interplay of language teachers’ identity, cognition, emotion, and agency, and the role of context: A scoping review
author: Khoa Dang Truong, Ngo Cong‐Lem, Bingqing Li
abstract: This scoping review explores complex interactions among identity, cognition, emotion, and agency in language teachers' socio-professional lives. relevance: 这篇scoping review聚焦语言教师身份、认知、情感与能动性之间的交互作用，与你今日主线"EMI课堂中translanguaging与身份协商"直接相关——尤其是你的行动研究稿件需要论证教师如何在反思性实践中重新协商自身身份并推动教学变革，这篇文章提供的"身份—能动性—情感—认知"交互框架及其多层语境因素的分析逻辑，恰好可以帮你把教师行动研究中的课堂发现从个人经验叙述提升为有理论锚定的论证。

relevance: 这篇论文讨论女性领导力与性别刻板印象，属于管理学/组织行为学领域的综述性文章，与你今日主线"teacher identity, institutional discourse, and emotion"仅在最宽泛的"制度如何塑造身份与处境"层面有微弱的概念联系，但它既不聚焦教育语言政策，也不涉及话语分析方法或教师群体，因此对你的活跃稿件（尤其是 Teacher Vulnerability / DLI）几乎没有直接可借鉴之处。

title: Novice language teacher identity construction: similarities, differences, and beyond
author: Mostafa Nazari, Peter I. De Costa, Sedigheh Karimpour
abstract: Abstract Scholarship on novice language teachers has often overlooked how novices comparatively develop personalized trajectories in the initial years. Data were collecte…
relevance: 这篇论文直接对应你今日主线"teacher identity, institutional discourse, and emotion"，尤其与Teacher Vulnerability / DLI稿件高度相关——它聚焦新手语言教师在入职初期如何通过情感与制度互动建构身份轨迹，与你关注的教师脆弱性、制度处境及身份协商形成对话。

title: Emotions, perspectives, and English language teacher identity construction: A phenomenographic‐narrative study
author: Mostafa Nazari, Sedigheh Karimpour
abstract: Abstract Despite the recent surge of interest in language teacher emotions, little research has examined the role of cognitive and social dimensions of teachers’ emotions in their identity construction. Adopting a phenomenographic‐narrative approach, the present qualitative study examined the connection between English language teachers’ perspectives, emotions, and identities. Seventeen Iranian En…
relevance: 这篇论文直接对应你今日主线"teacher identity, institutional discourse, and emotion"的核心交叉点——它明确将教师情绪的认知-社会维度与身份建构关联起来，而非将情绪停留在个人经验层面，这与你"Teacher Vulnerability / DLI"稿件中需要处理的"教师制度处境如何经由情绪塑造身份"议题高度吻合。

title: Translanguaging in the development of EFL learners’ foreign language skills in Turkish context
author: Muhammet Yaşar Yüzlü, Kenan Dikilitaş
journal: Innovation in Language Learning and Teaching
abstract: This study investigates the potential impact of translanguaging pedagogy on EFL learners’ four language skills, as well as their perceptions towards its in-class implementation as a pedagogy. title: Translanguaging, Emotionality, and English as a Second Language Immigrants: Mongolian Background Women in Australia
author: Sender Dovchin
abstract: Drawing on the translanguaging practices of Mongolian background English as a Second Language (ESL) immigrant women in Australia, this paper points out two main theoretical points: (1) when translanguaging moves beyond the classroom, it may provide ESL immigrants with an emotionally and linguistically safe space where they feel comfortable in managing their negative emotions through employing mult…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线（CSL peer interaction / MICM）的直接关联度较低，它聚焦的是课堂外移民女性的translanguaging与情感安全空间，而非同伴互动中的意义协商或语言相关片段机制。不过，它与你的活跃稿件"EMI Translanguaging / Action Research"及"Beyond Deficit / Xiaohongshu"在理论层面有间接交集——尤其是translanguaging如何超越课堂语境、与情感身份和权力分配交织的讨论，可以为你思考translanguaging框架的适用边界提供参照。

abstract: This series of reports explores new forms of teaching, learning, and assessment for an interactive world, to guide teachers and policy makers in productive innovation. title: Methods in predictive techniques for mental health status on social media: a critical review
author: Stevie Chancellor, Munmun De Choudhury
abstract: Social media is now being used to model mental well-being, and for understanding health outcomes. Computer scientists are now using quantitative techniques to predict the presence of specific mental disorders and symptomatology, such as depression, suicidality, and anxiety. relevance: 这篇论文关注的是计算机科学领域利用社交媒体数据预测心理健康状态的方法论评估，与你今日主线"社交平台多模态话语、可供性与身份建构"仅在"以社交媒体为数据来源"这一表层相交，核心问题意识（预测性建模的效度审查）和理论立场（计算社会科学/临床心理）与你的批判话语-翻译语言实践框架差距很大，属于边缘相关。

relevance: 这篇论文关注深度伪造（deepfake）技术的综述，属于计算机科学与信息安全领域，与你今日主线"社交平台多模态话语、可供性与身份建构"仅在"社交媒体上的虚假内容传播"这一极表层话题上有交集，但它既不涉及语言学分析框架，也不处理平台可供性如何塑造用户话语实践或身份协商，与你的Xiaohongshu稿件在理论关切、方法路径和分析对象上均无实质关联。

title: The growing field of digital psychiatry: current evidence and the future of apps, social media, chatbots, and virtual reality
author: John Torous, Sandra Bucci, Imogen Bell et al.
abstract: As the COVID-19 pandemic has largely increased the utilization of telehealth, mobile mental health technologies - such as smartphone apps, vir-tual reality, chatbots, and social media - have also gained attention. These digital health technologies offer the potential of accessible and scalable interventions that can augment traditional care. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive update on the …
relevance: 这篇论文属于数字健康/数字精神医学领域的综述，与你今日主线"社交平台多模态话语、可供性与身份建构"仅在"社交媒体作为研究场域"这一最表层重叠，其核心关切（临床干预效果、心理健康技术的可扩展性）与你的批判话语分析和translanguaging框架几乎没有对话空间。唯一可借鉴之处在于它对平台可供性（apps、chatbots、VR、社交媒体）进行分类梳理的写法——你在Beyond Deficit稿件中需要把小红书的图文、视频、评论区、标签等可供性写成"可分析的数据链"，而这篇综述展示了一种将不同技术载体的功能差异系统化呈现的结构策略，可以作为"如何把平台特征从背景提升为分析对象"的远距离参照，但其问题意识、理论工具和方法设计均不直接适用于你的研究。

title: The digital competence of university students: a systematic literature review
author: Anna Sánchez-Caballé, Mercé Gisbert Cervera, Francesc M. Esteve‐Mon
journal: Aloma Revista de Psicologia Ciències de l Educació i de l Esport
abstract: Digital competence is a pressing need for students in the 21st century. The present study is a systematic review of the literature on university students’ digital abilities. The methodology consisted of selecting documents (n=126) from three different databases (Scopus, Web of Science and ERIC) via peer review. The documents were selected for inclusion following predefined criteria and then analys…
relevance: 这篇论文是关于大学生数字素养的系统文献综述，与你今日主线（小红书上中英translanguaging的身份建构与功能分类）仅在"数字平台"这一表层语境上有交集，核心关注点（数字素养的技能分类框架）与你的translanguaging功能分类、多模态身份论证并无实质理论或方法对话。

title: Transpositioning: Translanguaging and the Liquidity of Identity
author: Li Wei, Tong King Lee
abstract: Abstract This article seeks to address the ever-expanding and shifting communicative demands of ‘liquid modernity’ by focussing on two key issues: the need to reconceptualize language and communication as a consequence of the diversification of media and resources people draw upon to meet these demands; and the need for a new analytical framework to capture how people perform multiplex roles simul…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"Chinese-English translanguaging in digital third spaces and identity work"高度契合，尤其是其核心贡献——提出"transpositioning"概念来捕捉人们如何通过translanguaging同时、动态地展演多重身份角色——直接对接你Beyond Deficit稿件中需要论证的关键环节：小红书用户如何借助中英文translanguaging的不对称功能完成身份建构。

title: Plurilingual and Pluricultural Competence

title: Differential impacts of e-portfolio assessment on language learners’ engagement modes and genre-based writing improvement

title: Enhancing academic writing skills and motivation: assessing the efficacy of ChatGPT in AI-assisted language learning for EFL students
author: Cuiping Song, Yanping Song

Methods: The study employs a comprehensive approach, combining …

title: Decolonizing <scp>English‐Medium</scp> Instruction in the Global South
author: Pramod K. Sah, Fan Fang
abstract: Abstract Many societies in the Global South have adopted English‐medium instruction (EMI) policies, but often ignoring—whether by design or involuntarily—the damages caused by the colonial legacy inherent in EMI. This neglect of the repercussions has also been inadequately addressed in the current EMI scholarship. Additionally, overlooking the coloniality and lasting effects of this neglect within…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"Translanguaging, identity negotiation, and action research in EMI classrooms"在理论批判层直接相关：它为EMI研究提供了一个decolonial lens，而你的稿件正需要在理论框架部分说明translanguaging为何不仅是教学策略、更是对EMI内嵌权力结构的回应——这篇文章的问题意识可以帮你把"为什么在中国EMI语法课堂做translanguaging具有变革意义"这一论证锚点写得更尖锐，避免把translanguaging仅仅框定为课堂便利工具。

title: Why linguistic entrepreneurship?
author: Peter I. De Costa, Joseph Sung‐Yul Park, Lionel Wee
abstract: Abstract This introduction builds on De Costa et al.’s (2016], [2019) notion of linguistic entrepreneurship, which is defined as “the act of aligning with the moral imperative to strategically exploit language-related resources for enhancing one’s worth in the world” (2016: 696). The four empirical studies and two critical commentaries that constitute this special issue explain the relevance of th…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"Translanguaging, identity negotiation, and action research in EMI classrooms"在理论概念层有明确关联：linguistic entrepreneurship 关注学习者如何策略性地调动语言资源以提升自身价值，这与你稿件中学生在EMI课堂通过translanguaging进行身份协商的论证逻辑高度呼应——两者共享"语言实践作为能动性资源"这一理论内核，可以帮助你在讨论部分为学生的translanguaging行为赋予更精确的理论命名（如将其定位为一种linguistic entrepreneurship的表现形式），从而让论证超越"学生使用了translanguaging且觉得有用"的经验总结。

title: Bringing the outside in: Connecting students’ out-of-school knowledge and experience through translanguaging in Hong Kong English Medium Instruction mathematics classes
author: Kevin W. H. Tai, Li Wei
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"Translanguaging in EMI classrooms"高度对齐，且同处亚洲EMI语境（香港），与你的中国大陆EMI语法课堂研究形成直接可比的地域-学科对话——它聚焦数学课，你聚焦语法课，两者都需要论证translanguaging如何在学科学习中激活学生已有知识资源并重新协商课堂参与身份。

title: Mapping research in student engagement and educational technology in higher education: a systematic evidence map
author: Melissa Bond, Katja Buntins, Svenja Bedenlier et al.
journal: International Journal of Educational Technology in Higher Education
abstract: Abstract Digital technology has become a central aspect of higher education, inherently affecting all aspects of the student experience. It has also been linked to an increase in behavioural, affective and cognitive student engagement, the facilitation of which is a central concern of educators. In order to delineate the complex nexus of technology and student engagement, this article systematical…
relevance: 这篇论文是一篇关于高等教育中学生参与度（student engagement）与教育技术之间关系的系统证据图谱综述，与你今日"classroom interaction, mediation, and participation"主线仅在"participation/engagement"这一宽泛概念层有表面交集，但实质关联度较低——它处理的是技术工具与学生参与的宏观映射，而非课堂互动中参与如何作为微观机制被构建，与你关注的互动数据如何写成机制的写作目标几乎不对接。

title: The social determinants of mental health and disorder: evidence, prevention and recommendations
author: James B. Kirkbride, Deidre M. Anglin, Ian Colman et al.
abstract: People exposed to more unfavourable social circumstances are more vulnerable to poor mental health over their life course, in ways that are often determined by structural factors which generate and perpetuate intergenerational cycles of disadvantage and poor health. Addressing these challenges is an imperative matter of social justice. In this paper we provide a roadmap to address the social deter…
relevance: 这篇论文属于公共卫生与社会决定因素领域，与你当前应用语言学方向的课堂互动、中介与参与研究主线没有实质性关联。虽然"结构性因素如何塑造弱势群体的处境"这一逻辑与你关注的语言政策、教师脆弱性研究在批判视角上有远距离呼应，但它既不涉及语言/话语数据，也不提供可迁移的互动分析方法或理论框架。唯一可能的微弱借鉴在于其"问题意识的写法"——论文将社会不公正从个体层面上升到结构性因果机制的论证策略，与你在 Teacher Vulnerability / Beyond Deficit 稿件中需要的"把制度性问题写得尖锐但有证据支撑"的修辞目标有写法层面的参考价值，但这一点也相当间接。总体判断：不相关或仅边缘相关。

title: Basic psychological need theory: Advancements, critical themes, and future directions
author: Maarten Vansteenkiste, Richard M. Ryan, Bart Soenens
relevance: 这篇论文聚焦自我决定理论中的基本心理需要理论（BPNT），属于动机心理学的理论综述，与你今日主线"classroom interaction, mediation, and participation"的关联仅停留在外围概念层——需要满足（autonomy, competence, relatedness）可以作为解释课堂参与动机的一个背景变量，但它本身并不处理互动数据、话语机制或语言教育政策中的权力分配问题，与你活跃稿件的核心问题意识距离较远。

title: The Problematic Concept of Native Speaker in Psycholinguistics: Replacing Vague and Harmful Terminology With Inclusive and Accurate Measures
author: Lauretta S. P. Cheng, Danielle Burgess, Natasha Vernooij et al.
abstract: Though the term NATIVE SPEAKER/SIGNER is frequently used in language research, it is inconsistently conceptualized. Factors, such as age, order, and context of acquisition, in addition to social/cultural identity, are often differentially conflated. While the ambiguity and harmful consequences of the term NATIVE SPEAKER have been problematized across disciplines, much of this literature attempts t…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线（小红书数字空间中的中英translanguaging与身份建构）的直接关联较弱，但在问题意识的修辞策略层面值得借鉴。你的Beyond Deficit稿件核心贡献之一是挑战"deficit framing"——即对双语者语言实践的单语规范化评判，而这篇论文做的是在心理语言学内部拆解"native speaker"这一看似中性的学科术语，揭示其概念模糊性与排斥效应，二者共享同一批判逻辑：用精确的、可操作的描述替代笼统的、带意识形态负荷的分类标签。

title: Investment and motivation in language learning: What's the difference?
author: Ron Darvin, Bonny Norton
abstract: The year 2020 marked the 25th year since Bonny Norton published her influential TESOL Quarterly article, ‘Social identity, investment, and language learning’ (Norton Peirce, 1995) and the fifth year since we, Darvin and Norton (2015), co-authored ‘Identity and a model of investment in applied linguistics’ in the Annual Review of Applied Linguistics. From the time Norton's 1995 piece was published,…
relevance: 这篇论文直接对应你今日主线中"身份论证"的理论根基：Norton 的 investment 框架正是你 Beyond Deficit 稿件用来解释小红书用户跨语实践背后身份工作（identity work）的核心概念，而该文对 investment 与 motivation 的精确区分能帮你在论文贡献部分更准确地定位你为什么选择 investment 而非动机视角——这是审稿人常问的理论选择辩护问题。

title: Artificial intelligence-based language learning: illuminating the impact on speaking skills and self-regulation in Chinese EFL context
author: Hongliang Qiao, Aruna Zhao
abstract: Introduction: This study investigated the effectiveness of artificial intelligence-based instruction in improving second language (L2) speaking skills and speaking self-regulation in a natural setting. The research was conducted with 93 Chinese English as a foreign language (EFL) students, randomly assigned to either an experimental group receiving AI-based instruction or a control group receiving…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线（AP Chinese assessment、metalinguistic asymmetry、epistemic authority）以及活跃稿件几乎没有实质性关联。它关注的是AI工具（Duolingo）对中国EFL学习者口语技能与自我调节的干预效果，属于技术辅助教学的实验研究，既不涉及评估文件的制度性批判，也不触及语言权力分配或元语言不对称问题。

title: Writing assessment literacy and its impact on the learning of writing: A netnography focusing on Duolingo English Test examinees
author: Chengyuan Yu, Wandong Xu
abstract: Abstract Language assessment literacy has emerged as an important area of research within the field of language testing and assessment, garnering increasing scholarly attention. However, the existing literature on language assessment literacy primarily focuses on teachers and administrators, while students, who sit at the heart of any assessment, are somewhat neglected. Consequently, our understan…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日"language assessment, fairness, and validity"主线高度相关，同时也直接呼应你AP Chinese / LAQ稿件中对考生如何理解与应对大规模写作评估的关注——它将assessment literacy的研究主体从教师/管理者翻转到考生端，并借助netnography捕捉考生在数字平台上围绕Duolingo English Test写作任务所形成的认知与策略，这与你Beyond Deficit / Xiaohongshu稿件中数字平台上用户话语实践的方法路径形成可类比的对话。

title: Interconnection between constructs and consequences: a key validity consideration in K–12 English language proficiency assessments
author: Mikyung Kim Wolf
abstract: Abstract In the US K–12 public school settings, each state’s annual English language proficiency (ELP) assessment, as part of an educational accountability system, has tremendous impact on English learner (EL) students’ academic paths and success. It is thus critical to establish a robust validation framework and empirical evidence to ensure that states’ ELP assessments are both appropriately inte…
relevance: 这篇论文直接对应你今日主线"language assessment, fairness, and validity"，且聚焦于K–12 ELP评估的construct定义与consequences之间的内在关联——这与你AP Chinese/LAQ稿件中需要处理的"construct界定如何牵动公平性后果"议题高度吻合。最值得借鉴的是它的问题意识搭建方式：作为perspective piece，它不做大规模实证，而是通过将construct与consequences这两个通常被分开讨论的validity维度显性地"interconnect"起来，把一个看似技术性的效度问题重新框定为关乎EL学生学业命运的政策公平问题——这种"把两个已知概念之间的断裂本身定义为研究gap"的写法，正是你当前需要强化的"尖锐但不夸张"的问题意识表达策略。

title: Classroom-based language assessment literacy and professional development need between novice and experienced EFL teachers
author: Ima Fitriyah, Fitriatul Masitoh, Utami Widiati
abstract: Classroom-based language assessment (CBLA) in the Indonesian context has become more significant since the shift of the assessment model from summative based assessment (Ujian Nasional or the final exam) to formative-based assessment (Asesmen Kompetensi Minimum (AKM); therefore, teachers need to develop their classroom-based language assessment literacy (CBLAL). The model places a greater emphasis…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日"language assessment, fairness, and validity"的扫描主线直接相关，但切入角度偏向教师assessment literacy及其专业发展需求，而非construct界定或fairness/validity的理论深挖。它更贴近你"Teacher Vulnerability / DLI"稿件中关注教师制度处境的那条线——即政策转型（从终结性到形成性评估）如何将评估能力的负担转嫁给教师，制造出一种能力缺口与脆弱性。

title: English as a Southern language
author: M. Obaidul Hamid
abstract: Abstract Drawing on the epistemologies of the Global South and the sociolinguistic reality of English in postcolonial Bangladesh, this article conceptualises English as a Southern language. This conception recognises the imperative of English for postcolonial societies in an English-dominant world while also emphasising the necessity of breaking away from its hegemony as represented by so-called n…
relevance: 这篇论文最贴近你今日主线中"translanguaging & multilingual practice"的理论底层——它从全球南方认识论出发重新定位英语的归属权，与你Beyond Deficit / Xiaohongshu稿件中挑战"标准语言意识形态"的批判话语立场直接对话，也与EMI Translanguaging稿件中需要处理的"谁的英语、谁的规范"这一问题意识相关。

title: Translanguaging and “English Only” at Universities
author: Toni Dobinson, Stephanie Dryden, Sender Dovchin et al.
abstract: Abstract Translanguaging literature has broadly discussed translanguaging as fostering expressive and creative interactions within classroom contexts. Often overlooked, however, are the responses of students who are encouraged to translanguage in spaces they previously deemed to be reserved for the dominant language only. Using Linguistic Ethno‐graphy, we investigate the interactions of eight Chin…
relevance: 这篇论文直接对应你今日主线中translanguaging在高等教育场景的实际张力，且与你的EMI Translanguaging / Action Research稿件高度相关——它聚焦的核心问题恰恰是当translanguaging被"鼓励"时，学生因既有的"English only"规范内化而产生的抵触或矛盾，这为你在EMI语境下讨论translanguaging的制度性与意识形态约束提供了直接对话点。

title: What’s in the family app?
author: Åsa Palviainen, Joanna Kędra
journal: Journal of Multilingual Theories and Practices
abstract: Communication within contemporary families is increasingly and to a significantextent mediated through technological devices and digital applications.Although the everyday reality of many multilingual families is permeated by technology, research on their digital and language practices has been scant. This article argues for the need for eclectic approaches that draw upon theories, practices, and …
relevance: 这篇论文直接对应你今日"digital discourse and multilingual practice"的扫描主线，同时与你Beyond Deficit / Xiaohongshu稿件中关注数字平台上多语实践的维度高度相关——它聚焦的是多语家庭如何通过数字应用进行语言传承与沟通，这与你思考数字空间中语言权力分配和身份塑造的核心关切一致。

title: Inclusion in Linguistics
author: Hudley, Anne H. Charity, Mallinson, Christine, Bucholtz, Mary
abstract: Abstract Inclusion in Linguistics, the companion volume to Decolonizing Linguistics, aims to reinvent linguistics as a space of belonging across race, gender, class, disability, geographic region, and more. The volume’s introduction theorizes inclusion as fundamental to social justice and describes the extensive dialogic and collaborative process through which the volume was developed. The twenty …
relevance: 这篇论文关注语言学学科内部的包容性与社会正义，属于学科制度批判层面的讨论，与你今日主线（CSL peer interaction, negotiation of meaning, LRE, MICM）没有直接关联。如果硬要挂靠，它与你长期关注的"语言如何分配权力、塑造身份"这一宏观问题意识有远距离呼应，尤其与"Teacher Vulnerability / DLI"稿件中涉及的制度性排斥和身份边缘化议题部分相关，但对你当前MICM稿件的理论框架、方法设计或结果表达均无可直接借鉴之处。最多在问题意识层面提醒你：当讨论CSL课堂互动中的权力不对称时，可意识到参与者身份（种族、语言背景、dis/ability）如何结构性地影响协商过程，但这并非今天写作需要优先强化的方向。

title: The (white) ears of Ofsted: A raciolinguistic perspective on the listening practices of the schools inspectorate
author: Ian Cushing, Julia Snell
abstract: Abstract England has had a schools inspectorate since 1839, first in the form of Her Majesty's Inspectorate (HMI), and since 1992, in the form of the Office for Standards in Education, Children's Services and Skills (Ofsted). The inspectorate, a workforce made up of a majority of white inspectors, conduct regular inspections of all state schools in England, producing reports which comment on vario…
relevance: 这篇论文直接对应你今日"language policy, ideology, and critical discourse"主线，并且与你"Teacher Vulnerability / DLI"及"Beyond Deficit"两条稿件高度共振——它聚焦的是一个制度性评估机构（Ofsted）如何通过听觉实践将种族化的语言意识形态嵌入学校督导报告，从而对教师与学生的口语表现施加规训权力，这与你关注的评估文件分配权力、教师制度处境以及deficit话语的运作逻辑一脉相通。

title: Should ChatGPT be biased? Challenges and risks of bias in large language models
author: Emilio Ferrara
abstract: As generative language models, exemplified by ChatGPT, continue to advance in their capabilities, the spotlight on biases inherent in these models intensifies. This paper delves into the distinctive challenges and risks associated with biases specifically in large-scale language models. We explore the origins of biases, stemming from factors such as training data, model specifications, algorithmic…
relevance: 这篇论文讨论大型语言模型中的偏见来源及其伦理风险，属于技术伦理与AI治理范畴，与你的核心研究主线——语言政策、意识形态与批判话语——仅有表层概念关联（如"bias""ideology"），但其问题域并不直接涉及教育语言政策、课堂互动或评估话语中的权力分配。它与你的任何一篇活跃稿件均缺乏直接对话点。

title: Teaching in the Age of Covid-19
author: Petar Jandrić, David L. Hayes, Ian Truelove et al.
relevance: 这篇论文标题指向COVID-19时期的教学经历，与你今日主线"Teacher vulnerability, dual language immersion, and institutional discourse"在教师处境与制度压力层面有表面关联——疫情本身构成了一种制度性危机语境，可能放大教师的脆弱性。但由于摘要缺失，无法判断该文是否深入到制度话语分析或结构层面的权力机制，还是仅停留在教师经验的描述性叙事。

title: Critical consciousness in children and adolescents: A systematic review, critical assessment, and recommendations for future research.
author: Amy Heberle, Luke J. Rapa, Flóra Faragó
abstract: Critical consciousness refers to an individual's awareness of oppressive systemic forces in society, a sense of efficacy to work against oppression, and engagement in individual or collective action against oppression. In the past few decades, interest in critical consciousness as a resource that may promote thriving in marginalized people has grown tremendously. This article critically examines t…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"Teacher vulnerability, dual language immersion, and institutional discourse"的关联是间接的、理论层面的：批判意识（critical consciousness）作为概念工具，可以为你分析DLI教师如何从个人脆弱体验中发展出对制度性压迫力量的结构性认知提供一个理论锚点——尤其是其中关于"从意识到行动"的分析框架，可能帮助你把教师叙事从"我经历了什么"提升到"这种经历反映了怎样的制度逻辑"。

title: Prejudice Reduction: Progress and Challenges
author: Elizabeth Levy Paluck, Roni Porat, Chelsey S. Clark et al.
abstract: The past decade has seen rapid growth in research that evaluates methods for reducing prejudice. This essay reviews 418 experiments reported in 309 manuscripts from 2007 to 2019 to assess which approaches work best and why. Our quantitative assessment uses meta-analysis to estimate average effects. Our qualitative assessment calls attention to landmark studies that are noteworthy for sustained int…
relevance: 这篇论文属于社会心理学领域的偏见减少元分析综述，与你今日主线"Teacher vulnerability, dual language immersion, and institutional discourse"的关联仅停留在极为间接的主题层面——双语沉浸教师可能面临制度性偏见，但该文并未触及教育语言政策、教师处境或话语分析中的任何核心概念。

title: The Contributions of Conversation Analysis and Interactional Linguistics to a Usage‐Based Understanding of Language: Expanding the Transdisciplinary Framework
author: Joan Kelly Hall
abstract: Abstract A key insight of a transdisciplinary perspective on second language acquisition (SLA) as articulated by the Douglas Fir Group (2016) is its usage‐based understanding of language. Evidence on the fundamental role that usage plays in shaping individual language knowledge is no doubt compelling. However, while the force of social interaction in shaping language knowledge is acknowledged, mis…
relevance: 这篇论文最贴近你"MICM / CSL Interaction"这条研究主线，因为它直接讨论会话分析（CA）和互动语言学如何补充基于使用的语言观，为课堂互动研究中"jointly constructed actions"的分析提供了更精细的理论锚点——这与你在CSL互动稿件中处理课堂话语序列和意义共建的核心关切高度吻合。

title: Marking and unmarking the (non)native speaker through English language proficiency requirements for university admission
author: Ingrid Piller, Agnes Bodis
abstract: Abstract This article examines the language ideologies undergirding university English language admission requirements. Universities are today caught between the order of the nation state and that of corporate globalization as they seek to attract both national and international students. This tension produces conflicting processes of (converse) racialization and linguistic (un)marking within whic…
relevance: 这篇论文直接对应你"AP Chinese / LAQ"稿件中评估文件如何分配语言权力的核心问题意识——它同样聚焦制度性文本（大学入学语言要求）如何通过看似技术性的能力门槛实质建构种族化的母语/非母语者身份，与你关注的评估政策中语言意识形态运作高度同线。

title: Research into practice: Virtual exchange in language teaching and learning
author: Melinda Dooly, Margarita Vinagre
abstract: Abstract In this article, the authors reflect on the ways research on Virtual Exchange (VE) has had an impact on language education practices and, conversely, areas in which research has been underexplored, misapplied or perhaps even over applied by VE practitioners in formal education settings. Starting from a brief historical overview of VE, the text first outlines the features widely accepted a…
relevance: 这篇论文聚焦虚拟交换（Virtual Exchange）在语言教学中的研究-实践转化，与你今日"sociolinguistics, bilingualism, and identity"的广扫主线仅在外围相切——它涉及跨文化交际语境下的语言学习，但核心关切是教学法层面的VE设计与实施，而非身份建构、多语实践或权力分配等你持续追问的议题，因此相关性较浅。不过，它最值得借鉴的是问题意识的收束方式：作者从一个看似无所不包的领域（VE研究全景）出发，通过区分"研究已落地的""被误用的""尚未充分探索的"三个层次来组织论证，这种"大领域、窄切口"的框架策略恰好对应你当前需要强化的写作能力——如何把identity/multilingualism这样的宽概念写得既有全景感又不失焦，可以参考其分层收束的逻辑结构。

title: Global Englishes Language Teaching: Bottom‐up Curriculum Implementation
author: Nicola Galloway, Takuya Numajiri
abstract: In today's globalised world, the needs of English language learners have changed, particularly those learning to use the English language as a lingua franca. Growing research showcasing the global use of English as a lingua franca (ELF), the creativity of ELF users, and the diverse ways in which they negotiate successful communication in multilingual encounters has numerous implications for the fi…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线（AP Chinese assessment, metalinguistic asymmetry, epistemic authority）的直接关联较弱，但在制度性论证层面有可借鉴之处：它聚焦的是一线教师如何在既有课程制度框架内"自下而上"地协商和实施替代性语言教学理念（GELT），这与你在AP Chinese稿件中需要论证的"考试文件如何自上而下预设语言规范、教师与学生在制度缝隙中的能动性受限"形成镜像对照，可以帮助你更精确地界定制度批判的边界——即区分"制度文件本身的意识形态取向"与"实践者对制度的回应空间"。

title: Towards a Comprehensive, Empirical Model of Language Assessment Literacy across Stakeholder Groups: Developing the Language Assessment Literacy Survey
author: Benjamin Kremmel, Luke Harding
abstract: While scholars have proposed different models of language assessment literacy (LAL), these models have mostly comprised prescribed sets of components based on principles of good practice. As such, these models remain theoretical in nature, and represent the perspectives of language assessment researchers rather than stakeholders themselves. The project from which the current study is drawn was des…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"AP Chinese assessment, metalinguistic asymmetry, and epistemic authority"的关联主要在制度性论证的层面，而非直接的主题层：它试图从经验数据（而非研究者预设）出发重新界定"谁的评估素养算数"，这与你在LAQ稿件中追问"谁的语言知识在AP评估框架中被赋予认识论权威"形成可对话的问题意识——都是在质疑评估话语中知识权力的分配前提。

title: Social Presence: Conceptualization and Measurement
author: Karel Kreijns, Kate M. Xu, Joshua Weidlich
abstract: Social presence is an important construct in online group learning. It influences the way how social interaction unfolds online and affects learning and social outcomes. However, what precisely social presence is has been under debate, as presently a plethora of different definitions and measures exist preventing the development of a coherent research field regarding social presence and its defini…
relevance: 这篇论文聚焦在线学习中"社会临场感"的概念化与测量争议，与你今日主线（AP Chinese assessment、元语言不对称、认识权威）以及活跃稿件的核心议题均无直接交集——它既不涉及语言评估政策、制度性权力分配，也不处理课堂互动中的认识权威协商。

title: Students’ low proficiency in spoken English in private universities in Bangladesh: reasons and remedies
author: Md Shaiful Islam, Mahani Stapa
abstract: Abstract Students of private universities in Bangladesh are often found to be less competent in spoken English. Since the universities have adopted EMI (English medium instruction) policy, the prevailing linguistic condition on the campus is an “English only environment.” In this context, students are required to communicate in English both inside and outside their classroom, but they desperately …
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"Translanguaging, identity negotiation, and action research in EMI classrooms"的关联仅停留在共享"EMI"这一宏观背景标签上，实质研究层面距离较远——它聚焦的是孟加拉国私立大学学生口语水平低下的原因与对策，属于典型的"问题诊断+补救建议"范式，既未涉及translanguaging理论视角，也未触及身份协商或行动研究方法论。

title: From intercultural to transcultural communication
author: Will Baker
abstract: The fluidity of communicative practices in current intercultural communication research raises difficult questions about how we understand core concepts in the field. Links between linguistic resources, other modes, and cultures are created in situ suggesting that relationships between ‘named' languages and cultures cannot be taken for granted. We frequently see emergent cultural practices and ref…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"Translanguaging, identity negotiation, and action research in EMI classrooms"在理论框架层高度相关：它从"intercultural"到"transcultural"的概念转移，与你稿件中将translanguaging定位为超越命名语言边界的变革性实践（transformative practice）共享同一认识论基础——即语言-文化关联是在具体情境中动态建构的，而非预设的。这能帮助你在框架部分更精准地论证EMI课堂中学生身份协商为何不能用传统的"两种语言/文化之间"的框架来解释。

title: Translanguaging in digital learning: the making of translanguaging spaces in online English teaching videos
author: Wing Yee Jenifer Ho, Kevin W. H. Tai
journal: International Journal of Bilingual Education and Bilingualism
abstract: Language learning through online platforms is becoming increasingly popular. The technological affordances of YouTube provide a translanguaging space for learners and teachers alike to bring their different identities, experiences and histories and create a coordinated performance (Li 2011 Li, W. 2011. “Moment Analysis and Translanguaging Space: Discursive Construction of Identities by Multilingua…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"Translanguaging, identity negotiation, and action research in EMI classrooms"在理论层高度重叠——它直接操作Li Wei的"translanguaging space"概念，并将其延伸到数字平台的多模态语境中，这与你EMI稿件中需要界定translanguaging space在课堂中如何被"创造"而非仅仅"发生"的论证逻辑非常对应。你可以借鉴它如何把"space"从隐喻概念转化为可分析的经验单位（即通过平台技术可供性来锚定space的边界），这恰好能帮助你在稿件中避免把translanguaging

title: How digitalization reinvented entrepreneurial resilience during COVID-19
author: Susana C. Santos, Eric W. Liguori, Erin M. Garvey
relevance: 这篇论文关注数字化情境下创业者韧性（resilience）的重构，属于创业学/管理学领域，与你的应用语言学研究在学科归属、理论资源和研究对象上均无直接交集。虽然"resilience"概念表面上可与你Teacher Vulnerability/DLI稿件中教师情感韧性的讨论产生联想，但该文的分析单元是企业家行为而非制度话语或身份建构，其理论框架和方法路径无法迁移到你当前任何一条研究主线。

title: “Distinguished” women entrepreneurs in the digital economy and the multitasking whirlpool
author: Irene Kamberidou
abstract: Abstract How are women entrepreneurs transforming and challenging traditional understandings of professional success in the 21st century, despite the multitasking whirlpool ? What type of knowledge and skills are required in today’s digital world to develop professionally and succeed as an entrepreneur? What are the major barriers to successful entrepreneurship preventing women from realizing thei…
relevance: 这篇论文关注女性创业者在数字经济中的身份建构与制度性障碍，与你今日主线中"identity"和"institutional discourse"有表层词汇重叠，但其学科根基在创业学与性别研究，并非教育语言政策或课堂话语分析领域，与你五篇活跃稿件（尤其Teacher Vulnerability / DLI、Beyond Deficit / Xiaohongshu）的语言学理论关切距离较远，属于仅部分主题相关。

title: Towards a New Conceptual Model of AI-Enhanced Learning for College Students: The Roles of Artificial Intelligence Capabilities, General Self-Efficacy, Learning Motivation, and Critical Thinking Awareness
author: Xi-Hui Jia, Jui-Che Tu
abstract: In the aftermath of the COVID-19 pandemic, college students have faced various challenges that could negatively impact their critical thinking abilities due to disruptions to education, increased stress and anxiety, less social interaction, and the advancement of distance learning relying more heavily on digital tools. With the increasing integration of AI technology across sectors, higher educati…
relevance: 这篇论文关注AI能力对大学生学习动机、自我效能与批判性思维的结构模型，属于教育技术与学习心理的量化建模研究，与你今日主线（teacher identity, institutional discourse, emotion）以及活跃稿件的批判话语/语言政策取向几乎没有直接交集。它既不处理教师身份或制度话语，也不涉及语言如何分配权力的问题意识。

title: Epistemic (in)justice in English medium instruction: transnational teachers’ and students’ negotiation of knowledge participation through translanguaging
author: Yongyan Zheng, Yixi Qiu
abstract: Informed by a combined framework of ‘translanguaging’ and ‘epistemic injustice’, this paper examines how a group of teachers and students from diverse linguistic and cultural backgrounds negotiated their knowledge participation through translanguaging in an English medium instruction (EMI) degree program at a Chinese university. Data were collected over a 12-month classroom ethnography, including …
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线（CSL peer interaction / MICM）的直接关联较弱——它聚焦的是EMI课堂中跨国师生的知识参与协商，而非CSL同伴互动中的意义协商或语言相关片段。不过，它与你的活跃稿件"EMI Translanguaging / Action Research"高度对口，且其"negotiation of knowledge participation"的概念化方式对你MICM稿件中如何将互动协商机制从描述性提升为可检验命题有间接启发。

title: Doing science through translanguaging: a study of translanguaging practices in secondary English as a medium of instruction science laboratory sessions
author: Jack Pun, Kevin W. H. Tai
abstract: This study explores how students in a joint process of knowledge construction through the use of multilingual and multimodal resources in groups promotes the learning of scientific concepts in the context of laboratory work. Inductive qualitative discourse analysis was conducted to examine how students’ translanguage in a group completing tasks in two Grade 10 secondary science labs (biology and c…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线（CSL peer interaction, negotiation of meaning, LRE, MICM）在方法层面有直接关联：它同样聚焦小组互动中的协作知识建构过程，并采用归纳式话语分析来追踪学生如何通过多语资源完成学科任务，这与你在MICM稿件中编码同伴互动微观机制（如LRE、meaning negotiation episodes）的路径高度平行。

title: Embodied and Enactive Approaches to Cognition
author: Shaun Gallagher
abstract: This Element discusses contemporary theories of embodied cognition, including what has been termed the '4Es' (embodied, embedded, extended and enactive cognition). It examines diverse approaches to questions about the nature of the mind, the mind's relation to the brain, perceptual experience, mental representation, sense making, the role of the environment, and social cognition, and it considers …
relevance: 这篇论文属于认知科学哲学层面的理论综述（4E cognition），与你今日主线（CSL peer interaction / MICM）的关联仅停留在间接的元理论层：embodied/enactive cognition 可以为你解释同伴互动中手势、环境资源与意义协商的关系提供深层认知理据，但它本身并不处理语言学习互动的微观编码或机制建模问题。

title: Transformative pedagogy for inclusion and social justice through translanguaging, co-learning, and transpositioning
author: Li Wei
abstract: Abstract The idea of translanguaging has disrupted much of the thinking in bilingual education. A common misunderstanding, however, is that translanguaging was intended to be a language teaching strategy. This article seeks to explore what a translanguaging approach to language teaching entails, with specific reference to the education of minoritized and racialized bilingual and multilingual learn…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"Chinese-English translanguaging in digital third spaces and identity work"在理论层高度相关。Li Wei此文将translanguaging从"教学策略"重新定位为追求inclusion与social justice的变革性教育路径，并引入co-learning和transpositioning两个概念来解释身份协商与权力再分配——这与你Beyond Deficit稿件中论证translanguaging的不对称功能如何超越"缺陷视角"、重塑用户身份的核心论证线直接对话。

title: Translanguaging and the Transdisciplinary Framework for Language Teaching and Learning in a Multilingual World
author: Constant Leung, Guadalupe Valdés
abstract: The ideas and arguments associated with translanguaging have generated highly energized debates on a number of fundamental issues in linguistics, applied language studies and language education. Aspects of many long-held and apparently settled concepts such as ‘language/s’, ‘code switching’ and ‘Second Language Acquisition/Teaching’ have been fundamentally challenged. As has been acknowledged by s…
relevance: 这篇论文直接对应你今日主线的理论根基：它梳理了translanguaging作为跨学科框架的核心争论（如与code-switching的边界、"语言"本体论立场），这恰好是你Beyond Deficit稿件在理论框架部分需要精简定位的关键——你可以借此文明确自己采纳translanguaging的哪一层含义（实践层vs.本体论层），从而避免概念堆叠。

title: Teaching English through pedagogical translanguaging
author: Jasone Cenoz, Durk Gorter
abstract: Abstract Teaching English has traditionally been associated with a monolingual bias and the exclusive use of English in the classroom is highly recommended in different countries. Nowadays English is widely used to teach academic content and this strict separation of languages can be problematic because it prevents students from using resources they have previously acquired in other languages (Cen…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"Chinese-English translanguaging in digital third spaces and identity work"的关联主要停留在理论概念层：它聚焦的是"pedagogical translanguaging"在课堂教学中的有意策略设计，而你的稿件关注的是数字第三空间中自发的、非对称的translanguaging功能与身份建构，场景和分析单位不同。不过，Cenoz & Gorter对"pedagogical translanguaging"与"spontaneous translanguaging"的区分恰好可以帮你在Beyond Deficit稿件的理论框架部分精确划界——你需要一句话说明你研究的translanguaging不是教师设计的教学

title: Navigating Taiwan's Bilingual 2030 Policy: Unveiling Teachers' Glocalization Efforts and Agency
author: Ching-Ching Lin, Ming-Hsuan Wu
abstract: As a strategic initiative aimed to enhance English communication skills and bolster the global competitiveness of the general population, Taiwan’s Bilingual 2030 Policy takes place at the intersection of neoliberalism, globalization, and the global spread of the English language. The neoliberal framing of Taiwan’s language education policy has exerted powerful influences on teacher education, teac…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"Translanguaging, identity negotiation, and action research in EMI classrooms"在宏观政策语境层高度相关：它聚焦台湾双语2030政策下教师如何在新自由主义与在地实践之间协商agency，这正是你EMI行动研究稿件需要搭建的"政策—制度—课堂"论证链条中上游的那一环——帮助你把课堂层面的translanguaging发现锚定到更大的语言教育政策张力中，而非悬空讨论。

title: Negotiating Emotional Entanglements: The Role of Religion and Identity in English and Arabic Medium Instruction
author: Irham Irham
abstract: ABSTRACT This study explores how emotions are entangled with religion, ideology, and identity in Arabic and English medium instruction classrooms at a state Islamic university in Indonesia. While the affective turn in applied linguistics has advanced understandings of emotion in language education, little is known about how emotions unfold in religious‐based EMI contexts. Drawing on interviews, cl…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"Translanguaging, identity negotiation, and action research in EMI classrooms"在EMI课堂中的身份协商与情感维度上高度相关，尤其是它将宗教意识形态、情感纠葛与教学语言政策交织分析的思路，可以帮助你思考自己稿件中学生在EMI语法课堂里身份协商的情感层——你的草稿若只停留在translanguaging的认知/策略层面而缺少情感-意识形态张力的讨论，论证会显得扁平。

title: Translanguaging and Content and Language Integrated Learning in Online Education: Rethinking Multilingual Pedagogy
author: Alexandros Gazis, Τheodoros Vavouras
journal: Journal of Linguistics and Education Research
abstract: This paper explores the interrelation between multilingualism, translanguaging, and Content and Language Integrated Learning (CLIL)/Integrating Content and Language in Higher Education (ICLHE) within the context of distance and digital learning environments. Drawing on a literature review (2019–2023) and an analysis of international implementations, the study highlights the pedagogical, technologi…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"Translanguaging, identity negotiation, and action research in EMI classrooms"在translanguaging与内容-语言整合教学的交叉点上相关，但层次较浅——它是一篇基于文献综述的宏观概述（CLIL/ICLHE + 在线教育），缺少课堂实证数据和行动研究设计，因此与你稿件中以教师行动研究驱动的微观课堂论证路径距离较远。

title: Assessing the Utility of ChatGPT Throughout the Entire Clinical Workflow: Development and Usability Study
author: Arya Rao, Michael Pang, John Kim et al.
abstract: ChatGPT achieves impressive accuracy in clinical decision-making, with increasing strength as it gains more clinical information at its disposal. In particular, ChatGPT demonstrates the greatest accuracy in tasks of final diagnosis as compared to initial diagnosis. Limitations include possible model hallucinations and the unclear composition of ChatGPT's training data set.
relevance: 该论文聚焦于ChatGPT在临床医学决策中的应用评估，属于医学信息学领域，与用户的三个研究方向均无直接关联。若做宽泛联系，其对AI工具效用的评估思路可为语言测试领域探讨AI辅助评分或AI生成反馈的有效性提供方法论参照，但论文本身不涉及语言教育、评估公平性或课堂互动等议题，关联性极低。

title: Digital Twin: Values, Challenges and Enablers From a Modeling Perspective
author: Adil Rasheed, Omer San, Trond Kvamsdal
abstract: Digital twin can be defined as a virtual representation of a physical asset enabled through data and simulators for real-time prediction, optimization, monitoring, controlling, and improved decision making. Recent advances in computational pipelines, multiphysics solvers, artificial intelligence, big data cybernetics, data processing and management tools bring the promise of digital twins and thei…
relevance: 这篇论文探讨的是工程与计算科学领域中"数字孪生"（Digital Twin）的建模技术，涉及虚拟仿真、人工智能与大数据等主题，与用户三个研究方向（语言评估与权力、课堂互动与中介、教师与制度研究）均无实质关联。该论文既不涉及应用语言学、语言教育，也不涉及社会文化理论或批判话语分析等相关理论框架，因此不具备参考价值。

title: Evaluation and mitigation of the limitations of large language models in clinical decision-making
author: Paul Hager, Friederike Jungmann, Robbie Holland et al.
abstract: Clinical decision-making is one of the most impactful parts of a physician's responsibilities and stands to benefit greatly from artificial intelligence solutions and large language models (LLMs) in particular. However, while LLMs have achieved excellent performance on medical licensing exams, these tests fail to assess many skills necessary for deployment in a realistic clinical decision-making e…
relevance: 这篇论文聚焦于大语言模型在临床医学决策中的局限性评估与改进，属于人工智能与医学交叉领域的研究。它与用户的三个研究方向均无直接关联：既不涉及语言评估中的权力与公正问题，也不涉及课堂互动与语言中介过程，更不涉及教师身份或双语教育制度。唯一可能的微弱联系在于该研究对"评估"（evaluation）局限性的反思——即标准化考试未能测量真实情境中所需的能力——这与用户方向一中对AP Chinese等标准化语言测试效度及washback

title: A Sociocultural Perspective on English-as-a-Foreign-Language (EFL) Teachers’ Cognitions About Form-Focused Instruction
author: Sun Qiang, Lawrence Jun Zhang
abstract: There has been much research into teacher beliefs about teaching and learning as seen in the general teacher education literature. In the field of language teacher education, this line of research has been evolving, with the recent trend being streamlined into "teacher cognition" as a generic or umbrella term. Despite increasing amounts of research output so far, research into foreign language tea…
relevance: 该论文从社会文化理论（Vygotsky）视角探讨中国大学EFL教师对形式聚焦教学的认知与决策，与方向三（教师与制度）直接相关，涉及教师信念、教学决策及其所处制度环境对教学实践的影响。同时，该研究关注课堂中的语法教学互动决策，与方向二（课堂互动与中介）中社会文化中介理论的应用有一定交叉。此外，教师认知研究中对教师内在经验与情感的关注，也可为方向三中教师脆弱性与情感劳动的研究提供

title: Critical review of validation models and practices in language testing: their limitations and future directions for validation research
author: Gwan-Hyeok Im, Dongil Shin, Liying Cheng
abstract: The purpose of this paper is to critically review the traditional and contemporary validation frameworks—the content, criterion, and construct validations; the evidence-gathering; the socio-cognitive model; the test usefulness; and an argument-based approach—as well as empirical studies using an argument-based approach to validation in high-stakes contexts to discuss the applicability of an argume…
relevance: 该论文系统审视了语言测试领域从传统到当代的各种效度验证框架（包括基于论证的方法、社会认知模型等），并聚焦高利害测试情境中的验证实践，这与方向一对AP Chinese等标准化考试的assessment研究直接相关，尤其在评估效度、washback效应及测试公平性方面提供了重要的理论基础。此外，论文对效度模型局限性的批判性分析可为方向一中运用CDA和epistemic injustice视角审视语言测试中的权力关系与知识合法性问题提供方法论参照，有助于揭示测试验证

title: Connecting foreign language enjoyment and English proficiency levels: The mediating role of L2 motivation
author: Haihua Wang, Lin Xu, Jiaxin Li
abstract: To further understand the connections between positive emotions, in particular foreign language enjoyment, second language (L2) motivation, and English achievement, the present study investigated how foreign language enjoyment and L2 motivation contribute to learners' English achievement and the mediating role of motivation in the pathway. A questionnaire was employed to collect quantitative data …
relevance: 该研究关注中国EFL学习者的外语愉悦感、二语动机与英语成绩之间的中介关系，涉及课堂情感因素与语言学习成效的联系，与方向二（CSL/课堂互动与中介）有一定间接关联，尤其在理解学习者情感如何中介语言发展过程方面。然而，该研究侧重量化问卷与动机变量，未涉及translanguaging、LRE、同伴互动等核心议题，也与方向一的评估公平性及方向三的教师制度研究无直接关联，整体关联度较低。

title: Harnessing the Power of AI: A Comprehensive Review of Its Impact and Challenges in Nursing Science and Healthcare
author: Seema Yelne, Minakshi Chaudhary, Karishma Dod et al.
abstract: This comprehensive review delves into the impact and challenges of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in nursing science and healthcare. AI has already demonstrated its transformative potential in these fields, with applications spanning from personalized care and diagnostic accuracy to predictive analytics and telemedicine. However, the integration of AI has its complexities, including concerns related…
relevance: 该论文聚焦AI在护理科学与医疗领域的应用及挑战，与用户的三个研究方向关联性较弱。不过，文中涉及的算法偏见（biases in algorithms and datasets）和伦理问题可与方向一中的认识论不公正（epistemic injustice）形成跨学科对话，即技术系统如何复制或加剧对特定群体的系统性偏见与权力不对等。此外，AI对专业实践的冲击也可类比方向三中教师面对制度变革时的脆弱性与情感劳动议题，但整体而言该文的医疗护理语境与用户的语言

title: FUTURE-AI: international consensus guideline for trustworthy and deployable artificial intelligence in healthcare
author: Karim Lekadir, Alejandro F. Frangi, Antonio R. Porras et al.
abstract: Despite major advances in artificial intelligence (AI) research for healthcare, the deployment and adoption of AI technologies remain limited in clinical practice. title: Leveraging Generative AI and Large Language Models: A Comprehensive Roadmap for Healthcare Integration

abstract: Generative artificial intelligence (AI) and large language models (LLMs), exemplified by ChatGPT, are promising for revolutionizing data and information management in healthcare and medicine. relevance: 这篇论文聚焦于生成式AI和大语言模型在医疗领域的整合应用，与用户的三个研究方向均无直接关联。尽管AI技术在教育评估和语言教学中具有潜在应用前景（如自动化评分或辅助语言学习），但该文专注于医疗健康场景，未涉及语言评估、课堂互动、教师情感劳动或双语教育等应用语言学核心议题，关联性极为有限。

abstract: The transformations in educational environments due to the immersion of information and communication technologies (ICT) make it necessary to analyze the limits and possibilities of the assessment of the virtual training process. relevance: 这篇论文直接关联方向三（教师与制度），其核心聚焦于语言教师的emotional labor，并将其置于行动研究（action research）框架下探讨教师专业发展，与用户关注的教师情感劳动和教师脆弱性（teacher vulnerability）高度契合。此外，该研究采用反思日志和课堂观察等质性数据收集方法，与用户方向三中自我民族志（autoethnography）所强调的教师主体经验与反思性探究在方法论精神上相呼应。该研究将emotion labor重新概念化为专业发展的积极资源而非单纯的情感

title: “I Would Purposely Try to Keep them Separated”: Language Ideologies, Language Policy, and Beliefs about Emergent Bilinguals in Career and Technical Education
author: Mark R. Emerick, Jodie L. Goldberg
abstract: Abstract In the policy context of college and career readiness, career and technical education (CTE) is growing in popularity, especially for students who are underserved in academic high school programs. While CTE has shown promise for some students, very little research exists on its potential for emergent bilingual students (EBs). Thus, building on research of deficit perceptions of EBs and lan…
relevance: 该研究考察职业技术教育（CTE）情境中对新兴双语学生的语言意识形态、语言政策及缺陷视角的再生产，与方向三（教师与制度）高度相关，涉及教育制度层面的政策实践及教师信念如何影响多语学生的受教育机会，也触及教师情感劳动与身份认同中可能出现的脆弱性。同时，该研究对语言意识形态和缺陷话语的批判性分析与方向一（评估与语言权力）中的批判话语分析（CDA）及认知不公正（epistemic injustice）视角相

title: Teaching in Two-Way Dual-Language-Bilingual Education: An Analysis of Teacher Language Ideologies and Linguistic Practices
author: Evelyn Baca
abstract: This qualitative study used ethnographic methods to explore connections between teachers’ linguistic ideologies, classroom practices, and local language policies. Using a language policy framework, I examined two dual language teachers’ diverse and at times conflicting language ideologies with consideration for how their individual beliefs about language influenced their pedagogical practices. I f…
relevance: 该研究直接关联方向三（教师与制度）：它聚焦双语沉浸式教育（DLI）中教师的语言意识形态与课堂实践之间的张力，涉及教师在制度性语言政策框架下的信念冲突与情感定位，这与教师脆弱性（teacher vulnerability）和情感劳动（emotional labor）的研究密切相关。同时，该研究采用民族志方法考察教师如何在课堂中协调多语实践与政策要求，也与方向二中的translanguaging和课堂互动研究形成对话。此外，语言政策框架下对教师语言意识形

title: We Are Best Friends: Animals in Society
author: Leslie Irvine
abstract: Friendships between humans and non-human animals were once dismissed as sentimental anthropomorphism. After decades of research on the emotional and cognitive capacities of animals, we now recognize human–animal friendships as true reciprocal relationships. Friendships with animals have many of the same characteristics as friendships between humans. Both parties enjoy the shared presence tha…
relevance: 这篇论文探讨人与动物之间的友谊关系及其超越口头语言的沟通方式，与用户的三个研究方向关联性极低。虽然文中涉及"非口头语言沟通"的概念，但其研究对象（人与动物的关系）和学科领域（人与动物研究/动物伦理）与用户关注的应用语言学议题——语言评估与权力、课堂二语互动、教师情感劳动等——几乎没有实质性交集。

title: The Impact of Teacher Identity on Curriculum Design
author: Willow Regnery
abstract: The iterative process of identity building that educators experience in the broader expanse of their lives directly impacts their pedagogical decisions and preferences. In addition, educators' relationship to place can be a significant factor in curriculum design in how they make connections between the classroom and the spaces their lives inhabit. A review of the literature looks at limits to the…
relevance: 该论文探讨教师身份认同如何影响课程设计决策，与方向三（教师与制度）直接相关，尤其呼应教师主体性、身份建构及其在制度框架内的教学实践选择，与teacher vulnerability和emotional labor所涉及的教师内在经验研究具有方法论和主题上的亲缘性。此外，论文关注教育体制的局限性与变革实践，也与方向三中DLI等制度性语境下教师能动性的议题形成对话。不过，该研究并未直接涉及语言教育或应用语言学领域，关联性属于间接层面。

title: Telling Half a Story: A Mixed Methods Approach to Understanding Culturally Relevant Engineering Education in Nigeria and the U.S.
author: Moses Olayemi
abstract: Abstract Nigerian students account for more than a quarter of all African students in the US, having just recently overtaken Mexico as the United States' 9th highest source of international students. These huge numbers, however, have not necessarily translated into seamless transitions for students who still have to cope with cases of systemic racism, discrimination, and microaggression. While sch…
relevance: 这篇论文与用户研究方向存在一定关联：它关注教育制度中的系统性种族主义、歧视与微侵犯，涉及教育公平与权力不对等问题，与方向一中epistemic injustice及CDA对制度性权力话语的批判性分析有呼应；论文探讨学校多元化与包容承诺之间的落差，涉及制度层面的话语与实践脱节，与方向三中制度批判（如DLI项目中教师在制度压力下的处境）有方法论和理论上的交叉，尤其在揭示教育机构权力结构如何影响边缘化群

title: Race and language teaching
author: Kerry Soo Von Esch, Suhanthie Motha, Ryūko Kubota
abstract: Abstract In this review article on race and language teaching, we highlight an urgent need for the international educational community to continue to develop a complex understanding of how language teaching and learners’ lives are shaped by our global history of racist practices of colonial expansion, including settler colonialism and transatlantic slavery. relevance: 这篇综述文章探讨种族与语言教学的交叉关系，涉及殖民扩张、种族主义如何塑造语言教学实践，与用户方向一高度相关——语言评估与权力结构中的认识论不公（epistemic injustice）及批评话语分析（CDA）均关注语言教育中权力、种族与意识形态的运作方式。同时，该文对语言教学中制度性种族主义的批判也呼应方向三中双语沉浸项目（DLI）教师所面临的制度性压力与脆弱性，因为DLI项目的设计与实施往往

title: Introducing Sociolinguistics
author: Acheoah John Emike, Abdullahi Sanni, Margaret Nonyerem Agu et al.
abstract: This paper presents an overview of sociolinguistics by examining the fundamental concepts and issues therein. Research efforts in sociolinguistics focus on speakers and their exploration of language to cope with their daily communicative goals in society. The innate potential of language to cope with a wide range of phenomena to be expressed by speakers is incredible. Indeed, the repertoire of lan…
relevance: 这篇论文是对社会语言学基本概念和议题的综述性介绍，与用户的研究方向存在间接但广泛的关联。首先，社会语言学关注语言与社会权力、文化规范及话语实践的关系，这与方向一中批评话语分析（CDA）及语言权力议题的理论基础相通；其次，社会语言学对语言使用者交际实践和语言repertoire的探讨，为方向二中translanguaging及课堂互动研究提供了学科框架。不过，该文属于学科入门性概述，缺乏针对具体教育评估、课堂互动或教师情感

title: Potential to use metaverse for future teaching and learning
author: Peter Onu, Anup Pradhan, Charles Mbohwa
abstract: Abstract Metaverse, a virtual shared space integrating augmented reality and virtual reality technologies, is often hailed as the “Internet of the future” for its potential to revolutionize online communication, collaboration, learning, and work. However, despite its promising strategic and business applications, there is a dearth of empirical evidence for evaluating its educational value. This qu…
relevance: 这篇论文探讨元宇宙（Metaverse）在教学与学习中的潜力与挑战，属于教育技术领域的宏观探索。虽然它涉及教学环境的创新，但未直接涉及语言评估与权力、课堂语言互动中介机制，或教师情感劳动与制度性议题，与用户三个研究方向的关联性较弱。若从远距延伸角度看，元宇宙作为新型互动空间可能为CSL课堂中的同伴互动、translanguaging实践提供新场景，但该论文本身并未涉及语言教育的具体讨论。

title: ASYNCHRONOUS DISCUSSION GROUPS IN TEACHER TRAINING CLASSES: PERCEPTIONS OF NATIVE AND NON-NATIVE STUDENTS
author: Sigrun Biesenbach-Lucas
abstract: This paper discusses students’ perceptions of an asynchronous electronic discussion assignment implemented shortly after the technology had been introduced to the university. relevance: 这篇论文关注教师培训课程中异步讨论小组的学生感知，涉及母语与非母语学生的不同体验，与方向三（教师与制度）有一定关联，因为它聚焦于教师培训情境中的教学实践与学生互动模式。同时，该研究涉及非母语学生在讨论中的参与体验，与方向二（课堂互动与中介）存在边缘联系，尤其在同伴互动（peer interaction）及语言使用层面，但其焦点在于技术辅助讨论而非面对面课堂中的语言调解过程。总体而言，该

title: Challenging the monolingual mindset: Understanding plurilingual pedagogies in English as an Additional Language (EAL) classrooms
author: Yvette Slaughter, Russell Cross
abstract: Current theories of bilingualism argue that the language practices of bilinguals are drawn from a single linguistic repertoire, and that enabling access to the full breadth of students’ language practices can be a vital resource for further language development. This challenges commonplace practices within English as an Additional Language (EAL) education in Australia, where curriculum, pedagogy, …
relevance: 该论文与上述研究方向有多重关联。首先，它关注在EAL课堂中运用多语教学法（plurilingual pedagogies），挑战单语主义思维，这与方向二中translanguaging及课堂互动中多语资源的运用直接相关。其次，论文探讨了课程、教学法与评估体系中根深蒂固的单语（English-only）结构如何制约教师实践，这与方向三中教师在制度性约束下的脆弱性（teacher vulnerability）以及方向一中评估体制所隐含的语言权力议题相呼应。此外，教师虽认同利用学生语言资源的必要

title: Translanguaging-as-Resource: University ESL Instructors’ Language Orientations and Attitudes Toward Translanguaging
author: Jennifer Burton, Shakina Rajendram
abstract: This article explores university English as a Second Language (ESL) instructors’ attitudes toward translanguaging in the classroom and possible reasons for instructors’ resistance in moving translanguaging ideology into English language teaching pedagogy. Many researchers have forwarded translanguaging as a theoretical and pedagogical approach to language education because of its potential cogniti…
relevance: 这篇论文与方向二（课堂互动与中介）和方向三（教师与制度）高度相关。它聚焦大学ESL教师对translanguaging的态度与语言取向，直接呼应方向二中translanguaging作为课堂教学资源的核心议题，同时涉及教师意识形态与教学实践之间的张力，与方向三中教师在制度环境下的情感劳动与脆弱性（如面对单语主义制度压力时的抵触与挣扎）形成对话。此外，教师对translanguaging的抵制也可延伸至方向一中语言权力与语言意识形态

title: A Systematic Review of Machine-Translation-Assisted Language Learning for Sustainable Education
author: Xinjie Deng, Zhonggen Yu
abstract: With the rapid development of artificial intelligence, machine translation (MT) has gained popularity in recent years. This study aims to present a systematic review of literature on MT-assisted language learning in terms of main users, theoretical frameworks, users’ attitudes, and the ways in which MT tools are integrated with language teaching and learning. To this end, relevant peer-reviewed ar…
relevance: 该研究关注机器翻译辅助语言学习，与用户方向的研究存在一定间接关联。首先，机器翻译作为一种中介工具，可与方向二中translanguaging和课堂互动研究产生对话，因为学习者使用MT在语言间切换的过程涉及跨语言实践和语言相关片段（LRE）的生成。其次，MT工具在语言教学中的整合方式可能对评估实践产生回冲效应（washback），与方向一中assessment和washback的关注点有边缘关联。但总体而言，该文以系统综述和技术工具整合为核心，未直接

title: Partnering with AI: Intelligent writing assistance and instructed language learning
author: Robert Godwin‐Jones
abstract: In recent years, advances in artificial intelligence (AI) have led to significantly improved, or in some cases, completely new digital tools for writing. Systems for writing assessment and assistance based on automated writing evaluation (AWE) have been available for some time. That is the case for machine translation as well. More recent are synchronous feedback tools, such as Grammarly. That too…
relevance: 这篇论文探讨AI辅助写语工具（如自动写作评估AWE、机器翻译、Grammarly等）在语言教学中的应用，与方向一中的assessment（评估）和washback（反拨效应）相关，因为自动写作评估系统直接涉及语言评估方式的变革及其对教学实践的反拨影响。此外，该论文涉及AI工具在语言学习课堂中的运用，与方向二的CSL课堂互动与中介有一定关联，因为智能写作辅助工具可视为一种新型中介手段，可能改变学习者在写作过程中

title: Essentials of a Theory of Language Cognition
author: Nick C. Ellis
abstract: Abstract Cognition is not just ‘in the head’; it extends well beyond the skull and the skin. Non‐Cartesian Cognitive Science views cognition as being embodied, environmentally embedded, enacted, encultured, and socially distributed. relevance: 这篇论文提出的非笛卡尔认知科学观（embodied, enacted, encultured, socially distributed cognition）及Douglas Fir Group的语言涌现观，与方向二的课堂互动与中介研究高度相关：translanguaging和同伴互动（peer interaction）正是语言认知社会分布性和情境嵌入性的课堂体现，而语言相关片段（LRE）的分析也植根于"认知不仅在个体头脑中、而是在互动中共建"这一理论前提。此外，该论文强调使用（usage）影响学习与语言本身，这一观点可为方向一中考试反

title: Generative artificial intelligence, co‐evolution, and language education
author: Steven L. Thorne
abstract: Kern's (2024, this issue) anchor piece in this issue of The Modern Language Journal offers the opportunity for critical reflection on the role of (human) teachers amidst an ever-widening range of technologies to facilitate second language (L2) development. As Kern so accurately describes it, since March 2020 and the global onset of COVID-19, many language educators accustomed to teaching in face-t…
relevance: 这篇论文探讨生成式人工智能背景下语言教师角色的重新定位与技术变革对语言教育的影响，与方向三（教师与制度）相关，涉及教师在技术冲击下面临的情感压力、脆弱性及职业身份转变问题。同时，文章对技术如何中介语言学习的批判性反思也与方向二（课堂互动与中介）有一定关联，因为AI工具正在重塑L2课堂中的互动模式与学习中介方式。此外，其对技术与制度性变革的批判性视角也可延伸至方向一中

title: A comprehensive AI policy education framework for university teaching and learning
author: Cecilia Ka Yuk Chan
journal: International Journal of Educational Technology in Higher Education
abstract: Abstract This study aims to develop an AI education policy for higher education by examining the perceptions and implications of text generative AI technologies. Data was collected from 457 students and 180 teachers and staff across various disciplines in Hong Kong universities, using both quantitative and qualitative research methods. Based on the findings, the study proposes an AI Ecological Edu…
relevance: 该论文聚焦高等教育中AI政策框架的构建，涉及教学法、治理等维度，与用户研究方向的直接关联较为有限。但其对教育政策与教学实践关系的探讨可为【方向三】中制度层面（如DLI政策、教师在制度变革中的角色与情感劳动）提供宏观政策分析的参照视角。此外，该研究对AI技术融入教学评估的讨论可能间接关联【方向一】中对评估公平性（如epistemic injustice）及评估反拨效应（washback）的思考，尤其是AI工具如何重塑语言评

author: Dong-shin Shin
abstract: This dissertation examines the academic and social goals that three second-grade English language learners in a U.S. urban school bring to their blog-mediated academic writing practices, and the interrelated nature of those goals. This study aims to bridge the dichotomy between approaches to studying computer-mediated language and literacy development that are oriented toward academic goals inside…

title: Thinking Like an Economist: How Efficiency Replaced Equality in U.S. Public Policy
author: Abigail Orrick
abstract: “The institution is run by an administration that prefers tranquility to equality, resisting the transformative changes necessary to address these critical issues” (Beyene et al., 2019). title: From Validity to Equity: Revisiting CET-4 Through Messick, Kane, and Paraskeva’s Frameworks
author: Zhi Ma
journal: International Journal of Language and Linguistics
abstract: The College English Test Band 4 (CET-4) is a high-stakes, standardised English proficiency assessment widely administered in Chinese universities. Initially developed to evaluate non-English majors’ language competence, it has since evolved into a gatekeeping mechanism that influences graduation eligibility, access to scholarships, postgraduate admissions, and employment opportunities. As English …
relevance: 该论文与用户【方向一】高度相关。首先，它聚焦于高利害标准化英语考试（CET-4）的效度与公平性问题，直接呼应用户对assessment及其权力功能的关注；其次，论文运用Messick、Kane等效度框架并引入Paraskeva的公平视角，对考试作为"守门机制"（gatekeeping mechanism）的社会后果进行批判性审视，与用户关注的epistemic injustice和washback效应密切相关。此外，对考试如何影响不同学习者群体的公平评估问题的探讨，也可与CDA视角下语言测试中权力再生产的

title: Critical Thinking Dispositions of Undergraduate College Students in A Comprehensive University of Mainland China
author: Huarong Ma
abstract: This study was undertaken to assess the critical thinking dispositions of undergraduate college students in a comprehensive university of mainland China and examine the roles of gender and major in the subjects’ critical thinking dispositions. An adapted Chinese version of the California Critical Thinking Dispositions Inventory (CCTDI) was used to survey 534 undergraduate students. Statistics reve…

title: From classroom learning to real-world skills: an autoethnographic account of school field trips and STEM work immersion program management
author: Dharel P. Acut
journal: Disciplinary and Interdisciplinary Science Education Research
relevance: 这篇论文采用自我民族志（autoethnography）方法探究学校实地考察与STEM职场沉浸项目的管理经验，与方向三中autoethnography作为研究方法论的运用直接相关。此外，论文关注从课堂学习到真实世界技能的转化过程，涉及教育制度与教师在项目管理中的角色，这与方向三中教师经历及制度层面的研究关切有一定呼应。然而，该研究聚焦于STEM教育而非语言教育，与用户核心关注的语言评估、课堂互动及语言教师情感劳动等议题的直接关

title: Countering Discourses of Derision: Moving towards Action in Teacher Education in the USA and Sweden
author: Katarina Blennow, Martin Malmström, Elizabeth Petroelje Stolle
abstract: This article is about how negative discourses of teacher education position teacher educators and how they might influence or inspire action. We use self-study methods to investigate the political dimension of teacher education in two national contexts: Sweden and the USA. More specifically, we examine the emotions stirred by the positioning related to being a teacher educator and how those emotio…
relevance: 本文聚焦教师教育者如何被负面话语所定位，以及由此引发的情感体验与抵抗行动，这与方向三高度相关：研究涉及教师在制度性话语中的脆弱性（teacher vulnerability）、情感劳动（emotional labor），以及通过自我研究方法（与autoethnography相近的反身性质性方法）探讨教师教育者的主体性与能动性。此外，文章运用话语分析视角审视权力与定位，也与方向一中批评话语分析（CDA）及话语权力的关注点有所呼应。

title: The Virtual Ballet Studio: A Phenomenological Enquiry into the Domestic as Dance-Space During Lockdown
author: Francesca Ferrer-Best
abstract: The paper is based on an autoethnographic study of dancing via Zoom over the Covid19 lockdown in Sydney, Australia. abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic, necessitating remote instruction in the vast majority of educational institutions around the world, put technology squarely at the center of language learning and teaching.
